expectedIssues: BetRivers Exclusive Games badge shows 0 games
reportedIssues: The page appears wider than the viewport. Content on the right side is clipped, including the top category tab and the rightmost game cards.
Game cards are partially cut off on the right edge, making some game artwork and labels unreadable.
The fixed bottom navigation overlaps the lower game cards, hiding part of the content near the bottom of the screen.
The 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' section shows visible game tiles, but the badge says '0 Games', which is contradictory.
The top category navigation shows a partially visible 'Hot Ga...' tab at the right edge, which looks unintentionally cropped.

expected.reasoning: Issue 3 directly describes the BetRivers Exclusive Games badge showing 0 games despite visible game tiles, matching the expected defect.
